stemHtml: F-GTPO already in contact with Lille Tower transmits a PAN PAN. Which statement about the procedure is correct?

options.a: The standard urgency phrase is MAYDAY, not PAN PAN.
options.b: Urgency transmissions must be on 121.500 MHz.
options.c: Urgency transmissions should be on the frequency in use.
options.d: The addressee name should be omitted to save time.
